item.name: Gensui Shrimp
item.description:
The green carapace of this shrimp is said to be the same emerald hue as the sweeping hills that make up the Gensui Chain.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: As this shrimp ages, its body becomes a deep shade of green. It is reminiscent of a legend of the Gensui Chain about a hermit whose skin took on the hue of the sweeping hills he lived among, leading some locals to call the species “hermits”─to the discomfit of foreign diners.
